title: claim + evidence records
description: Upsert a claim, link evidence, or resolve a contradiction. A 'supported' claim needs supports-evidence from valid results/analyses and no contradicts link with resolved=0.

evidence_kind.description: empirical role of this evidence for claim-level campaign coverage (optional, additive).

evidence_proof.description: Kind-specific PROOF metadata read by campaign coverage. Required keys by evidence_kind: main_result/baseline_comparison {metric, direction}; ablation {changed_factor, controls, delta, parent_result(resolvable result_id)}; robustness {varied_condition, original_condition, criterion}; negative/boundary {hypothesis, observed, implication}; significance {method, effect}; efficiency {resource, metric, baseline}; error_analysis {error_category, subset, implication}. reference/external sources additionally need {source|citation}. An evidence_kind without valid proof is NOT counted toward coverage.

resolution_ref.description: artifact/decision rebutting the contradiction; sets resolved=1
